# datahub_glossary_terms (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub glossary terms visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by `searchAcrossEntities` (OpenSearch). Terms created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Use the returned `urns` list as the `for_each` value in `import {}` blocks to bulk-import an existing glossary into Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_glossary_terms" "all" {}

output "glossary_term_urns" {
  value = data.datahub_glossary_terms.all.urns
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub URNs for all glossary terms (e.g. `["urn:li:glossaryTerm:revenue"]`).
